title: hoarea marginata
intro: Hoarea marginata, also known as Strophanthus gratus or Strophanthus marginatus, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is a climbing shrub with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in strophanthin, a cardiac glycoside that has been used to treat heart conditions such as congestive heart failure and arrhythmias, due to its ability to regulate heart rate and improve cardiac function. Hoarea marginata is often prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal purposes, and its health benefits also include lowering blood pressure and acting as a natural diuretic.
